data.title: CME Group set to launch Solana futures on March 17, strengthening ETF prospects
data.description:
CME Group revealed the Solana (SOL) futures launch on Mar. 17, pending regulatory approval, citing increasing client demand. Nate Geraci, CEO of The ETF Store, noted that the development “definitely bodes well” for SOL exchange-traded fund (ETF) prospects. According to a Feb. 28 statement, the new Solana futures contracts will be available in two sizes: […]
The post CME Group set to launch...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/cme-group-set-to-launch-solana-futures-on-march-17-strengthening-etf-prospects/

data.title: Bitcoin rebounds to $84K — Analysts say BTC crash was ultimate buy signal
data.description:
Regulatory developments, nation-state exposure, onchain data and TradFi integration are proof that BTC’s fundamentals were unaffected by the recent sell-off.

data.title: ‘TRUMP’ Trademark Filing Hints at Metaverse, NFT Plans
data.description:
The Trump Organization may be entering the world of NFTs and the metaverse, as a recent trademark filing for the ‘TRUMP’ name suggests a move into digital asset trading and virtual environments. A trademark application filed with the United States Patent and Trademark Office on February 24, 2025, by DTTM Operations LLC, reveals the intent to use the ‘TRUMP’ brand within a new digital...
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/02/28/trump-trademark-filing-hints-at-metaverse-nft-plans/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=trump-trademark-filing-hints-at-metaverse-nft-plans

data.title: Crypto losses to hacks & scams hit $1.6B in 2025, up 8x YoY: Immunefi
data.description:
The crypto sector has recorded a surge in security incidents throughout the first half of 2025, with overall losses estimated at $1.6 billion, as shown in the latest report by blockchain security company Immunefi. The uptick is an 8-fold rise from the same time frame in 2024, during which losses totaled around $200 million. February […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-losses-hit-1-6b-in-2025-up-immunefi/

data.title: Millions of Dollars To Be Handed Out Per Year – No Strings Attached – As US City Launches New Guaranteed Income Pilot Program
data.description:
A US city is launching a guaranteed income pilot program that will disperse millions of dollars per year to families living below the poverty line. Billed as the “first-ever cash prescription program” in Kalamazoo, Michigan, the Rx Kids guaranteed income pilot program has allocated $10 million to help pregnant and nursing mothers financially during the early […]
The post Millions of Dollars To...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/28/millions-of-dollars-to-be-handed-out-per-year-no-strings-attached-as-us-city-launches-new-guaranteed-income-pilot-program/

data.title: Ukraine Considers 5-10% Tax on Crypto Income to Fund Budget
data.description:
According to a recent report, Ukrainian officials are drafting legislation to legalize and tax cryptocurrencies, proposing a 5-10% tax rate on crypto earnings to support the state budget and military. As discussions on the exact tax rates continue, officials stress the importance of taxing all sources of income, including cryptocurrency earnings.
The post Ukraine Considers 5-10% Tax on Crypto...
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ukraine-considers-5-10-tax-on-crypto-income-to-fund-budget/

data.title: Binance founder CZ says market pullbacks are natural in free markets
data.description:
Former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao (CZ) has addressed the ongoing market meltdown telling investors that dips and market corrections are normal in free markets such as the crypto industry.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-founder-cz-market-pullbacks/
